TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Mauricio Macri = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 2 jiyax 8 ka Mauricio Macri ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Argentina ta sayang o kiya ka Mauricio Macri, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 12 jiyax 10 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = mauɾiʦio maʦɾi = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka mauɾiʦio maʦɾi ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan aɾgəntina ta sajaŋ o kija ka mauɾiʦio maʦɾi, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Mauricio Macri = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 2 jiyax 8 ka Mauricio Macri ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Argentina ta sayang o kiya ka Mauricio Macri, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 12 jiyax 10 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = mauɾiʦio maʦɾi = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka mauɾiʦio maʦɾi ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan aɾgəntina ta sajaŋ o kija ka mauɾiʦio maʦɾi, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
